Class NumberType<T extends Number>

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.datatype.AbstractDataType<Number,T>
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.builder.datatype.NumberType<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIDataType<Number,T>, Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
BigDecimalType, BigIntegerType, ByteType, DoubleType, FloatType, IntegerType, LongType, ShortType
public abstract class NumberType<T extends Number> extends AbstractDataType<Number,T>

Abstract NumberType class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
